headline: Stock Market Focused On Iran War. Oil's Next Move Could Be Big.
summary: With the stock market reeling from crude oil's record week, investors await Iran war news, including any Trump moves.

headline: General Dynamics Leads 5 Stocks Near Buy Points Amid Iran War Sell-Off
summary: HCA Healthcare, TJX trade near buy zones. General Dynamics closes in on entry. Dividend plays AT&T, Equinix among stocks to watch.

headline: General Dynamics Submarine Contracts Shape Long Cycle Defense And Valuation Story
summary: General Dynamics is playing a key role in major U.S. Navy submarine programs, supported by recent contract activity that reinforces its position in undersea defense platforms. New awards and ongoing work in long term submarine construction and armored vehicle programs are contributing to the company’s multiyear backlog visibility. These contracts reflect sustained U.S. government demand for General Dynamics’ core defense systems at a time of elevated geopolitical tensions. For investors...
